visual_features.overall_style: Corporate, template-based marketing site with a modern-but-conventional WordPress feel. Uses strong blues, a hero image with overlay, large bold headline text, and a two-column blog/content layout. Style leans professional and business-like rather than highly minimalist or experimental.
visual_features.visual_hierarchy: Hierarchy is driven by scale, color contrast, and placement. The top contact bar uses a dark navy band to anchor the page, followed by a white navigation bar with logo on the left and main links in the center/right. The primary focal point is the hero headline centered over a full-width background image; high contrast white text on a darker overlay makes it dominant. Below the hero, the main content area on the left (large project image) is visually heavier than the right sidebar 'Categories' card, establishing a clear primary vs secondary content hierarchy.
visual_features.whitespace_usage: Moderate whitespace with fairly generous vertical spacing between the major sections (top bar, nav, hero, main content). Internal padding in cards and containers is comfortable but not overly spacious, maintaining readability while still feeling content-focused. The hero headline has ample padding above and below, giving it strong emphasis against the background image. Side margins between the main content column and the sidebar are clearly defined, avoiding crowding.
unique_elements: Dual-header structure: a slim dark navy contact bar above a white main navigation bar
Prominent right-aligned primary CTA button ('Get A Free Quote') in the top bar
Full-width hero background image with centered bold headline text and subtle dark overlay
Floating chat widget docked to the left side with a square icon button and attached 'Chat with us' pill
Sidebar 'Categories' card styled as a distinct elevated panel with a minimal bullet/indicator line on the left of the active category

layout_characteristics.grid_system: Implicit 12-column grid, typical of Bootstrap/WordPress themes, with a main content column and a narrower sidebar column.
layout_characteristics.layout_pattern: Full-width header + hero, followed by a two-column content layout (main content left, sidebar right).
layout_characteristics.section_organization: Top-to-bottom structure: (1) slim contact/info bar, (2) primary navigation bar with logo, (3) full-width hero section with background image and central headline, (4) main content area with large image/content on the left and sidebar card(s) on the right. Sections are separated by clear horizontal breaks and background color changes (image vs solid white).
layout_characteristics.alignment: Left alignment for logo, address/email/phone, and main content text; center alignment for hero heading; right alignment for some navigation items and the CTA button. Navigation items are horizontally aligned with even spacing. Sidebar content is top-aligned relative to the main content area.
responsive_hints: Navigation links are placed in a horizontal row and likely collapse into a hamburger menu on smaller screens.
Two-column main content + sidebar layout likely stacks into a single column on mobile, with main content above sidebar.
Hero headline is centered and largely text-based, making it easy to reflow responsively while keeping the image as a flexible background.
Chat widget is pinned to the left edge, suggesting fixed positioning that adapts to viewport height.
layout_characteristics.content_arrangement: Linear top-to-bottom flow with: (a) a full-width top info bar, (b) a full-width white navigation bar, (c) a full-width hero image section with centered headline, and (d) a two-column content section where a large visual (project photo) occupies roughly two-thirds of the width on the left and a stacked sidebar card ('Categories') occupies the remaining right third. Within the hero, content is vertically centered over the image. Within the main section, the left column presents media/content first, while the right sidebar shows a single structured card listing categories.
layout_characteristics.space_allocation: The top info bar is relatively shallow (about 8–10% of the viewport height), the navigation bar slightly taller (around 10–12%). The hero section occupies a substantial portion of the initial viewport height (roughly 40–45%), ensuring the headline dominates above the fold. Below that, the remaining vertical space is primarily taken by the main content block, with the left column image occupying the dominant width (around 65–70%) and the sidebar the remaining 30–35%. Cards and inner elements have consistent internal padding, maintaining clear separation between functional chunks.
layout_characteristics.content_density: Moderately spacious marketing layout. Headline and hero area are very open, with large text and substantial padding. The top bars are relatively information-dense but remain readable due to clear icon usage and typographic contrast. The main content area below is slightly denser, with large imagery but still adequate whitespace around the sidebar card and between elements, avoiding a cluttered feel.
layout_characteristics.visual_flow: Primary visual flow follows a Z-pattern: starting at the top left with the address/logo area, moving right across contact info and the 'Get A Free Quote' CTA, then diagonally down to the centered hero headline, then back left to the main project image, and finally right to the 'Categories' sidebar. Within the hero, the user’s eye is drawn immediately to the bold white headline against the darker image overlay. In the main content, the large project photo anchors attention before the eye shifts to the lighter, elevated categories card.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Solid rectangular buttons with moderate border-radius (approximately 4–6px). The primary CTA ('Get A Free Quote') uses a saturated blue (#1C4F97) on the dark navy header, making it stand out. Text is white, uppercase or title-case, and medium-bold. No visible border line; separation is achieved via color contrast. The chat widget entry appears as a blue square icon button on the left edge with a small radius and a paired white pill-shaped tile ('Chat with us') with rounded corners, dark text, and subtle shadow, mimicking a speech bubble.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Primary CTAs likely implemented as <a> elements styled as buttons (e.g., <a class="btn btn-primary">) within the header. The chat widget is probably a positioned container <div> encompassing a clickable button/icon and an adjacent text container, driven by a script from a chat provider. Buttons generally combine text-only; icon support is likely via <i> or <span> elements inside the button.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Cards (e.g., 'Categories') are white rectangles with subtle corner rounding (~4px radius) and a very soft drop shadow (e.g., 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.05)), giving a light elevation above the white page background. Internal padding is generous (around 24–32px). The card title is bold and larger than the body text. Category items have a slim colored indicator line or small icon on the left and text on the right, with evenly spaced vertical gaps. The overall style is flat with minimal decoration, relying on shadow and spacing.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Typical card markup: <div class="card"> containing <h3 class="card-title"> followed by a <ul class="card-list"> with <li> items for categories. The shadow and radius are applied via card class; inside, flexbox or simple block layout aligns small indicators/icons and text.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Although no full form is visible in the provided view, consistent with the theme and the CTA, forms are likely clean and simple: full-width text inputs with light borders (#E0E0E0–#E5ECF8), white background, and small radius (~4px). Labels are probably placed above inputs, in a regular-weight sans-serif. Primary submit buttons match the main CTA styling (blue background, white text). Error states likely use red border and small red helper text below the field; success or neutral states keep subtle borders.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Forms would typically use a stacked layout with <label> above <input> or <textarea>, grouped in <div class="form-group"> elements. Validation messages appear in small <span class="error"> below each input. Submit actions use <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">. For quote forms, multiple fields are likely grouped under a single form element rather than split across columns on mobile.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Horizontal top navigation with a white background. Logo occupies the left side; menu items are center/right aligned, using uppercase or title-case sans-serif text with moderate letter-spacing. Each nav item is separated by consistent horizontal gaps. The active or hovered item likely changes text color to the primary blue or adds an underline/bottom border. The 'Get A Free Quote' CTA is visually distinguished as a filled blue button within or adjacent to the navigation area. Icons for phone and social links are simple line icons, white on the dark navy bar.

ui_patterns.visual_description: Sidebar lists (e.g., categories) feature low-density items with plenty of vertical padding (8–12px between items). Each item includes a small left accent—a thin colored bar or a minimal icon—and the text on the right. No heavy borders; separation is implied via spacing and slight hover color changes. The appearance is clean and unobtrusive, keeping focus on titles rather than detailed metadata.
ui_patterns.structural_pattern: Structurally implemented as <ul> with <li> children. Each <li> may contain an <a> tag for clickable items and a nested <span> for the icon/indicator. Flexbox (display: flex; align-items: center;) is likely used to align the indicator and text horizontally. For project or blog listings, similar patterns might turn each item into a media object (thumbnail + text) or a card grid using flex or CSS grid.

heading.visual_style: Bold geometric/humanist sans-serif with clean strokes, moderate x-height, and low contrast. Headlines are heavy and slightly wide, conveying a modern, friendly corporate tone.

body.visual_style: Neutral, legible sans-serif suitable for paragraphs, navigational text, and labels. Clean and unobtrusive with good readability at small sizes.

spacing_system.component_padding: Buttons and small UI elements use 8–12px vertical and 16–24px horizontal padding. Cards and major containers use 24–32px internal padding on all sides to maintain clear separation from the background.
spacing_system.section_margin: Major vertical gaps between sections (e.g., between hero and main content) use approximately 48–64px. Vertical spacing between stacked elements inside sections (headlines, paragraphs, images) is typically 16–24px.

interaction_hints: Navigation links likely use color change and/or underline on hover, with the active page link highlighted in the primary blue.
Primary buttons probably darken slightly or add a subtle shadow on hover, with smooth 150–250ms transitions on background-color and box-shadow.
Cards may elevate slightly on hover via increased box-shadow and small upward translation (transform: translateY(-2px)).
Chat widget is fixed-position; clicking the chat icon or 'Chat with us' pill likely expands a modal or docked chat window with a slide-up animation.
Hero background might use a gentle parallax or fade-in effect on page load, while text can appear with a short fade/slide animation for added emphasis.
